meta.name: assistant
meta.description: Panel-based personal assistant with a plugin architecture for productivity workflows. AI agents share a workspace of notes, lists and other panels with the user. Supports Claude Code, Codex, and pi CLI agents with text and voice interfaces. Extend with custom plugins or use built-in plugins exported as skills with CLIs.
